column3: Upon doing A, B happens / When A, B
column5: 教室に入ると先生がレオ君に言いました。
column6: Upon entering the classroom, the teacher spoke to Leo-kun.

column5: お母さんが起こしてくれなかったんです。
column6: Because my mother didn't wake me up.
column7: In the negative past, 〜てくれなかった means someone did not do something for me/us.

column3: Command telling someone to do something
column7: A firm but less blunt command form often used by parents or teachers.
